CREATE TABLE tbl (id INTEGER, value DOUBLE);
SELECT * FROM tbl;
SELECT value FROM tbl WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, SUM(value) FROM tbl GROUP BY id;
SELECT * FROM tbl ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 2;
CREATE TABLE t1 (a INTEGER, b INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE t2 (a INTEGER, c INTEGER);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, 2), (3, 4);
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (1, 5), (3, 6);
SELECT * FROM t1 JOIN t2 USING (a);
SELECT #1, #2 FROM tbl;
SELECT DISTINCT value FROM tbl;
SELECT (SELECT AVG(value) FROM tbl) AS average_value FROM tbl;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, value * 2 AS doubled_value FROM tbl) AS subquery WHERE doubled_value > 30;
CREATE TABLE addresses (city VARCHAR, state VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO addresses VALUES ('New York', 'NY'), ('Los Angeles', 'CA'), ('New York', 'NY');
SELECT DISTINCT city FROM addresses;
SELECT rowid, id, value FROM tbl;
SELECT rowid, id, sum(value) OVER (PARTITION BY id) AS total FROM tbl;
CREATE TABLE sample_data (num INTEGER);
INSERT INTO sample_data VALUES (1), (2), (3), (4), (5);
SELECT * FROM sample_data USING SAMPLE (2);
SELECT rowid FROM tbl WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tbl WHERE value < 20);
SELECT * FROM tbl WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM tbl WHERE value > 15);
